heading: Isle of Man (Part of the UK terroritory for VAT purposes)
body:
Atlas applies UK VAT (Value Added Tax) unless you provide a valid GB VAT (Value Added Tax)
registration number. To avoid UK VAT (Value Added Tax) charges, include a valid `VAT ID Number`
on your [default recipients for billing alerts](atlas-billing-profile).

[Flex Consulting](flex-consulting) doesn't charge VAT (Value Added Tax).
